page: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-32 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128 GB of system memory. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture, this instance maintains a balanced resource allocation ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core.

This server configuration does not include local NVMe SSD storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage volumes. Additionally, the instance does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses, which requires network administrators to configure external routing or NAT gateways for public internet connectivity.

The n4a-standard-32 offers a balanced resource profile suitable for workloads requiring moderate memory-to-CPU ratios without the overhead of specialized hardware. It is designed for general-purpose workloads such as web serving, application hosting, containerized microservices, and medium-scale database deployments that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-32 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128 GB of RAM on the x86_64 architecture. This configuration provides a balanced resource ratio of 4.0 GB of memory per virtual core, making it suitable for standard enterprise workloads. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU accelerators, requiring reliance on network-attached storage for persistent data. It also lacks complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This server type is designed for workloads such as web serving, application backends, containerized microservices, and general-purpose database hosting where dedicated CPU resources are required without the need for specialized hardware acceleration or local high-speed disk arrays.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-32 is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 128 GB of RAM, designed for balanced workloads without local storage or GPU acceleration.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-32 is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 128 GB of RAM, lacking local storage.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring thirty-two dedicated cores and a standard four-to-one memory-to-CPU ratio for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
No local storage or integrated GPU hardware
Suitable for web serving and containerized microservices
